data.narrative: Linda is a 21-year-old female working as a elementary worker. They have secondary or less level education and very good health. They live as: couple without children. They own a car and a bike.

encounters.contact_narrative: Robert is a 24-year-old male working as a technician or associate professional. They have master or above level education and fair health. They live as: couple without children. They rely on public transport or walking.
